next-app-shadcn.description: Next.js 15 (App Router) + TypeScript + Tailwind + minimal shadcn-style UI primitives + Vitest. Use for SaaS web apps, dashboards, marketing sites with interactive features.
next-app-shadcn.scaffold_pr_body:
## Context

Auto-scaffolded by the SDLC Agentic Pipeline using the `next-app-shadcn` curated template.

## Includes

- Next.js 15 (App Router)
- TypeScript strict mode
- Tailwind CSS with shadcn-style design tokens (CSS variables, light + dark)
- Minimal `Button` + `Card` UI primitives
- Vitest + React Testing Library for unit tests
- ESLint via `next/core-web-vitals`

## Why first

Feature tickets in subsequent PRs assume this scaffold is in place — `package.json`, `tsconfig.json`, `tailwind.config.ts`, and the `@/*` path alias all need to exist before the agent can add components on top.

## Self-review

Generated from `templates/next-app-shadcn/`. No business logic.
